Session 1 	Session 2 	Session 3 	Session 4 	Session 5 	Session 6
In this training, Teresa is going to walk you step by step through creating the event assets you will need for your event. Having the proper materials
prepared for you, your guest speakers and your attendees is extremely important. And with this training Teresa is going to walk you through what you
should prepare for and what should be on your to‐do list.
S E S S I O N O V E R V I E W
TAKE NOTES
ACTION STEPS
Finalize your event agenda with your sessions and any guest speaker sessions.
Create all worksheets, tools and presentations that may be needed.
Create an “Expense Tracker” document like Teresa’s
Make a list of all printed material needed and execute on the creation and printing.
Receive, review, edit and finalize any speaker slides that may be used. Including you and any guest speakers.
